title: Into a Landscape
synopsis: Today, somewhere, a landscape is born on paper. Eventually, it will become immobile. But the landscape within us never ceases to flow and expand. The colors and shapes push and pull -- not even a moment of preservation. 1st year work 2024, Tokyo University of the Arts, Graduate School of Film and New Media, Department of Animation. (Source: Geidai Animation)

tags.name: Graduation Project
tags.description: A work made by students in place of an exam, typically at higher levels of education, either as a work for the entire course or as a work for a specific year of a course.

title: Dwelling
synopsis: I am home to a body that is susceptible to lethargy. I struggle to find symbiosis between my metaphysical self and my corporal self. Graduate Work 2024, Tokyo University of the Arts, Graduate School of Film and New Media, Department of Animation. (Source: Geidai Animation)

title: 700 Gram no Gogo
synopsis: The cactus girl has just started living on her own. In that room she dozes off and wanders in a place that feels neither real nor unreal. 1st year work 2024, Tokyo University of the Arts, Graduate School of Film and New Media, Department of Animation. (Source: Geidai Animation)

title: whimsies
synopsis: When the paper was folded and then spread, the creases looked like lines. These lines made the paper seem a little three-dimensional and also looked like they meant something. I often get lost in such thoughts. Graduate Work 2024, Tokyo University of the Arts, Graduate School of Film and New Media, Department of Animation. (Source: Geidai Animation)

title: Ishi no Youna Jikan no Melody
titleRomaji: Ishi no Youna Jikan no Melody
titleNative: 石のような時間のメロディ
synopsis: Unable to bear the death of his beloved dog, the old man brings it back to life. His dog becomes a monster and swallows him. Inside, the old man is forced to face his memories and the meaning of his life. Graduate Work 2024, Tokyo University of the Arts, Graduate School of Film and New Media, Department of Animation. (Source: Geidai Animation)

tags.name: Martial Arts
tags.description: Centers around the use of traditional hand-to-hand combat.

tags.name: Cultivation
tags.description: Features characters using training, often martial arts-related, and other special methods to cultivate qi (a component of traditional Chinese philosophy, described as "life force") and gain strength or immortality.

title: selector loth WIXOSS PV
synopsis: Special PV released to commemorate the 10th anniversary of selector infected WIXOSS depicting the original cast as adults with callbacks to the original series's first opening.

title: Farmagia
synopsis: In Felicidad, farmers known as the Farmagia raise monsters under the peaceful rule of the Magus Diluculum. After the Magus passes, a power struggle erupts among forces using monsters to seize control. In the town of Centvelt, Farmagia Ten and his friends band together against the despotic new ruler, Glaza. Ten, his friends, and their home-grown monsters must stay strong to defend their freedom. (Source: Crunchyroll)

tags.name: Ensemble Cast
tags.description: Features a large cast of characters with (almost) equal screen time and importance to the plot.

tags.name: Proxy Battle
tags.description: A proxy battle is a battle where humans use creatures/robots to do the fighting for them, either by commanding those creatures/robots or by simply evolving them/changing them into battle mode.

title: Luka and the Flower of the Sun
titleEnglish: Luka and the Flower of the Sun
synonyms: Luka and the Flower of the Sun
synopsis: The story, set in a village covered in clouds, depicts the bond between a boy, Luka, and his childhood friend, Rosa. One day, Rosa, who has the power of the sun, hears from a mysterious duo that there is a way to clear the clouds. Luka, on the other hand, is attracted to a traveling band that visits the village and decides to leave... (tomoyasu.net, edited)

title: Girls' F1st!!!! GT
titleNative: ガールズフィスト!!!! GT
synopsis: Girls' Fist!!!! GT, the manga branch of the Girls' Fist!!!! media mix project, is getting animated! Starting today, the project's official YouTube channel will air a 13-episode short anime. The story is set in Matsumoto City, Nagano Prefecture, and centers on four high school girls who form a band to fulfill their dream of performing on stage at a music festival. (Source: Crunchyroll News)
